chunks.title: Judgments for Molech and Mediums
chunks.reason: Introduces the section with divine speech regarding specific capital offenses against God's holiness.

chunks.title: Call to Holiness
chunks.reason: A transitional command urging the people to set themselves apart based on God's nature.

chunks.title: Family and Sexual Purity Laws
chunks.reason: A detailed catalog of specific familial and sexual transgressions with their corresponding penalties.

chunks.title: Reasons for Separation
chunks.reason: Explains the theological basis for the laws by contrasting Israel with the nations and promising the land.

chunks.title: Judgment on Mediums
chunks.reason: Concludes the chapter with a specific legal ruling on mediums and spiritists.
